message.content:
@startuml participant "main" as main participant "OsScheduler" as OsScheduler participant "Semaphore" as Semaphore participant "TaskA" as TaskA participant "TaskB" as TaskB participant "System" as System main ->> OsScheduler : startOS activate OsScheduler OsScheduler ->> TaskA : launch activate TaskA TaskA <-x Semaphore : waitSemaphore activate Semaphore Semaphore -r System : callSystem activate System note right of System setJump(buf) loop while(1){} selfref left #red:green:red:green;line:brown;text:black;bold;fontName:"Comic Sans MS";fontSize:20px;color:#98FB98;backgroundColor:white;borderWidth=3pt:borderStyle=dashed:borderLineColor=#ff6b47:textAlign=center setjmp
(buf):**return** value = _longjump_(); endloop deactivate TaskA @enduml
